prestazioni: Engine swap to a Fiat Twin-Cam (DOHC) 1800cc '124 BC.000' block with forged Mahle pistons (8.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a custom billet crankshaft by JE Pistons for 2.0L displacement. Pair with a custom camshaft profile by Schrick (284° duration, 11.5mm lift) and titanium retainers by Supertech for high-RPM stability (8,500 RPM redline).

Forced induction via a Garrett GT3076R turbocharger (0.82 A/R turbine housing) with a custom cast-iron exhaust manifold by Tubular Automotive, mated to a Tial MV-R 44mm external wastegate and a custom air-to-water intercooler setup by Bell Intercoolers (core dimensions: 12" x 6" x 3.5"). Boost target: 1.5 bar (21.7 psi) with a custom ECU tune by Autronic SM4 standalone (fueling via Bosch 0280158036 850cc injectors and a Walbro 450 LPH fuel pump).

Drivetrain upgrades including a Quaife ATB differential (80% lock) in a custom billet aluminum differential housing by Fidanza, paired with a 5-speed ZF S5-31 close-ratio gearbox (gear ratios: 2.95, 1.94, 1.34, 1.00, 0.73) and a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch (240mm diameter, 6-puck organic/metallic hybrid). Chassis reinforcement via a custom 4-point roll cage by Custom Cages UK (T45 steel, MIG-welded) and polybushings by SuperPro (part #SPF0116K) for the front suspension.
estetica: Full custom widebody conversion using a Rare Rides 124 Sport Coupe kit (fiberglass fenders, quarter panels, and front bumper with integrated vents), paired with a custom carbon fiber hood by Seibon (vented, 30% weight reduction). Rear diffuser by Rocket Bunny (polyurethane, bolt-on) with integrated dual 3.5" exhaust outlets by Milltek Sport (stainless steel, non-resonated).

Suspension overhaul with Ohlins Road & Track coilovers (DFV2, 2-way adjustable damping) and custom camber plates by SPC Performance (part #81260) for -3.5° front camber. Wheel setup: 17x9.5" ET25 front and 17x10.5" ET30 rear BBS RS-GT II (gold, 5x108 PCD) with Nankang AR-1 semi-slick tires (245/40/17 front, 275/35/17 rear).

Interior stripped and reupholstered with Recaro SRD-E seats (fixed-back, carbon fiber shells) and a custom MOMO Prototipo steering wheel (350mm diameter, suede with FIAT 124 Sport Coupe embroidery). Full digital dash by AIM MXS Strada (10" display) with integrated traction control and launch control, paired with a custom aluminum shift knob by CAE (short-throw, weighted) and a custom roll cage padding kit by Sparco (fire-retardant, Alcantara-wrapped).
